name: Harry Potter Collection
overview: The Harry Potter films are a fantasy series based on the series of seven Harry Potter novels by British writer J. K. Rowling.

parts.original_title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
parts.overview: Harry Potter has lived under the stairs at his aunt and uncle's house his whole life. But on his 11th birthday, he learns he's a powerful wizard—with a place waiting for him at the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. As he learns to harness his newfound powers with the help of the school's kindly headmaster, Harry uncovers the truth about his parents' deaths—and about the villain who's to blame.
parts.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone

parts.original_title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
parts.overview: Cars fly, trees fight back, and a mysterious house-elf comes to warn Harry Potter at the start of his second year at Hogwarts. Adventure and danger await when bloody writing on a wall announces: The Chamber Of Secrets Has Been Opened. To save Hogwarts will require all of Harry, Ron and Hermione's magical abilities and courage.
parts.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

parts.original_title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
parts.overview: When his name emerges from the Goblet of Fire, Harry Potter becomes a competitor in a grueling battle for glory among three wizarding schools. Signs of Voldemort's return emerge as Harry's friends help him prepare for the Triwizard Tournament.
parts.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

parts.original_title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
parts.overview: Dumbledore tries to prepare Harry for the final battle with Voldemort while Death Eaters wreak havoc in both Muggle and Wizard worlds.
parts.title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince

parts.original_title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
parts.overview: Harry Potter's life is in danger once more as dangerous wizard Sirius Black has escaped from Azkaban Prison and is heading to Hogwarts.
parts.title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

parts.original_title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
parts.overview: When a new professor's methods leave Hogwarts unprepared to fight the rising tide of evil, Harry teaches students how to defend against the dark arts.
parts.title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix

parts.original_title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1
parts.overview: Harry, Ron and Hermione walk away from their last year at Hogwarts to find and destroy the remaining Horcruxes, putting an end to Voldemort's bid for immortality. But with Harry's beloved Dumbledore dead and Voldemort's unscrupulous Death Eaters on the loose, the world is more dangerous than ever.
parts.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 1

parts.original_title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2
parts.overview: Harry, Ron and Hermione continue their quest to vanquish the evil Voldemort once and for all. Just as things begin to look hopeless for the young wizards, Harry discovers a trio of magical objects that endow him with powers to rival Voldemort's formidable skills.
parts.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2
